contentBlocks.title: How does the WebP to TIFF converter work?
contentBlocks.html: Convert WebP images to professional TIFF for printing and archiving. Conversion runs entirely in your browser — files are never sent to a server. No registration, no file limit.

items.question: What is TIFF format?
items.answer: TIFF is a professional lossless image format used in printing, publishing, and archiving. It supports high color depth and multiple layers.

items.question: Are TIFF files larger than JPG?
items.answer: Yes. TIFF files are typically much larger because they use lossless compression or no compression at all.

items.question: Are my files sent to a server?
items.answer: No. Conversion runs entirely in your browser. Files never leave your computer.
